items.title: You Switched to Claude Over Surveillance Fears. Now It Wants Your Passport
items.summary: Anthropic quietly rolled out government ID and selfie verification for Claude—a first among major AI chatbots, and a peculiar pivot for a company whose privacy stance just drove a record wave of users away from ChatGPT.

items.title: 'Killing Satoshi': $70M Bitcoin Film Starring Casey Affleck Will Make Heavy Use of AI

items.summary: Legal & General Asset Management brings decades-old money market funds onto blockchain rails to expand access and enable faster settlement.

items.title: Tether adds $70 million in bitcoin to reserves, bringing holdings above 97,000 BTC
items.summary: The USDT stablecoin issuer has now accumulated over $7.1 billion in bitcoin as part of its strategy to recycle up 15% of its profit into BTC.

items.title: Free Qwen Is Dead: Alibaba Shuts Down Qwen Code Free Tier
items.summary: Alibaba shut down Qwen Code's free tier today, following MiniMax's license bait-and-switch. The idea that Chinese labs are the "open-source good guys" is crumbling fast.
